# 2026-03-25 — Wednesday

Woke before the alarm, which is new.

Worked on the the dataset doctor pass. 0.8 is the right knob; 0.85 over-merged, 0.9 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Pushed the fix. Ran ruff twice to be sure.

Mum called. She is fine. Father is fine. The dog is fine.

Made pasta. Ate pasta. Read. Slept.

Ran into Duarte at Sintra. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.
